Murder in Metal City

Arcane Spontaneous Spells.name: 奥术自发法术 Arcane Spontaneous Spells

Shifting Surge.name: 位移涌动 Shifting Surge
Shifting Surge.description:
你释放出一股魔法能量的涌动，暂时改变武器造成的伤害类型。该武器下一次进行的打击会造成你选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害，并额外造成1d6点与该武器通常伤害类型相同的伤害。

高环阶（+2） 额外伤害增加1d6。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{法术效果：变转涌流}

You release a surge of magical energy that temporarily changes the type of damage dealt by a weapon. The next Strike the weapon makes deals your choice of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage and deals an additional 1d6 extra damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.pWm0NCsxjxTUCJ7y]{Spell Effect: Shifting Surge}

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Thunderstrike.name: 雷击术 Thunderstrike
Thunderstrike.description:
你呼唤一道伴随着雷鸣之声的闪电，对目标造成1d12点电击伤害和1d4点音波伤害，基础反射豁免。穿戴金属护甲或者由金属构成的生物在豁免中承受-1环境减值，若它们受到该法术的伤害，会陷入@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 Clumsy 1}，持续1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d12点电击以及1d4点音波。

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你将注意力集中于目标，收集数据，同时魔法全息影像显示出相关信息。当施法完成时，你会获知目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你，或任何接受你分析建议的人，在对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{冒充}检定、对该生物进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{治疗伤口}检定，以及对其进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识}检定时，获得+1状态加值。若目标是虚幻之物，或处于幻觉魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术环阶时，你才会察觉到这一点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{法术效果：分析目标}

强化（3环） 状态加值提升为+2，且你最多可以将10个生物作为目标。

强化（6环） 状态加值提升为+3，且你可以将任意数量的生物作为目标。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Gouging Claw.name: 凿爪术 Gouging Claw
Gouging Claw.description:
你将你的手臂暂时变为一个长爪的附肢。进行一次近战法术攻击骰，对抗你的目标的AC。如果你命中，你选择造成2d6挥砍或者2d6穿刺伤害，以及2点持续流血伤害。在大成功时，你造成双倍伤害加上双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6，并且持续流血伤害增加1。

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Ricochet.name: 跳弹 Ricochet
Ricochet.description:
一个由闪耀钢铁构成的旋转圆盘或光滑球体会从一个目标跃向另一个目标。你造成 2d4 点钝击或挥砍伤害（进行一次基础反射豁免）。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 1d4。

A spinning disk or smooth orb of shimmering steel leaps from one target to another. You deal 2d4 bludgeoning or slashing damage (with a basic Reflex save).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Arcane Focus Spells.name: 奥术专注法术 Arcane Focus Spells

Warp Probability.name: 扭曲概率 Warp Probability
Warp Probability.description:
触发条件 你的攻击检定或豁免检定失败。

你敞开心智，解读多元宇宙的底层概率。重骰该次失败的检定，并采用较好的结果。

Trigger You fail an attack roll or saving throw.

You open your mind to read the underlying probability of the multiverse. Reroll the failed check and take the better result.

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
升级： 0

这种柔软却坚韧的织物能完美贴合穿戴者的身体，在不牺牲舒适性的前提下提供基础防护。第二层皮肤通常穿在便服里面。

Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商用） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行计算机检定以入侵计算机需要一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与该计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网网络进行接触。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Laser Pistol.name: 激光手枪 Laser Pistol
Laser Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把袖珍手枪凭借其可靠性、耐用性和价格实惠，成为协约世界最受欢迎的随身武器。大多数常见的激光手枪都有轻质聚碳机身，末端是细长的枪管。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol is the most popular sidearm in the Pact Worlds thanks to its reliability, durability, and affordability. Most common laser pistols have a lightweight polycarbon body ending in a long, slim barrel.

Semi-Auto Pistol.name: 半自动手枪 Semi-Auto Pistol
Semi-Auto Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这把手枪会在每次射击后自动弹出用过的弹壳并装填新的弹药。

Upgrades: 1

This pistol automatically ejects used cartridges and loads new ammunition after every shot fired.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: 破片手雷（商用） Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域火焰

重击 @Damage[1[bleed]]

这些破片手雷会在一团弹片云中爆炸，并在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 穿刺伤害，且可进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际开拓者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品中。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来方便携带和花费金钱的一种工具。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能以极其简单的动作接收或支付资金。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别信息才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码或念诵特定法术，才能取用储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数额更大的信用点储备通常会被安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的方式。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们身上一般也只会保留恰好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换成信用点，并因此携带信用棒来花费这种兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根都专门用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以直接把整根棒交易出去。若一个人携带的信用棒数量多到累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的负载。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Ysoki.name: 伊索基 Ysoki
Ysoki.description:
伊索基曾被称为鼠族，聪明而灵活。伊索基在无数世界上扎根，与体型更大的物种并肩合作，帮助建立社区并完成艰巨的任务。从最拥挤的人群到最狭窄的隧道，伊索基总是知道如何找到自己的路。

Once known as ratfolk, ysoki are clever and flexible. With roots on countless worlds, ysoki work alongside larger species, helping to establish communities and accomplish tough tasks. From the largest of crowds to the tightest of tunnels, a ysoki always knows how to find their way.

Sharp Teeth.name: 尖牙 Sharp Teeth
Sharp Teeth.description: 你突出的尖锐门牙能成为如同拳头一般的战斗武器。你获得可以造成1d4穿刺伤害的颚无武装攻击。你的颚属于搏击武器组并且具有灵巧和娴熟特征。

Tunnel Ysoki.name: 地道鼠奇尼斯人 Tunnel Ysoki
Tunnel Ysoki.description:
你那小得惊人的骨骼让你能够轻松压缩身体，从而挤过各种缝隙，无论是墙壁之间、通往一根断开的数据线缆的空隙，还是空间站的管道系统。你获得“快速挤压”专长，即使你未受过特技训练也是如此。对于你而言，那些还没狭窄到需要使用“挤压”动作的狭小空间不属于困难地形。

Your incredibly small bones allow you to easily compress your body and squeeze through gaps, whether it's the space between walls to reach a severed data cable or the ductwork of a space station. You gain the Quick Squeeze feat, even if you aren't trained in Acrobatics. Tight spaces not tight enough to require the Squeeze action aren't difficult terrain for you.

Quick Squeeze.name: 快速挤压 Quick Squeeze
Quick Squeeze.description: 你每轮可以在挤入（Squeeze）狭窄空间时移动5尺（大成功10尺）。若你在特技技能上的熟练度达到传奇，你可以在挤入狭窄空间时全速移动。

City Slicker.name: 城里人 City Slicker
City Slicker.description:
你在大型聚居地生活得够久，因此知道如何保持低调、避免直接目光接触，以及在日常活动中不引起任何人的注意。无论你曾是跟踪嫌疑人的侦探，还是只是住在犯罪横行的街区，你总是能够混入人群，以避免招惹麻烦。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在敏捷或魅力上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在欺瞒技能以及关于某个特定聚居地的一个知识技能上受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.N68CjcvYmLF35KrD]{人群中的面孔}技能专长。

You've lived long enough in a major settlement to know how to keep your head down, avoid direct eye contact, and otherwise move about your day without drawing any attention to yourself. Whether you were a detective tailing a suspect or just lived in a crime-ridden neighborhood, you've always been able to slip into a crowd to avoid causing trouble.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Deception skill and a Lore skill about a specific settlement. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.N68CjcvYmLF35KrD]{Face in the Crowd} skill feat.

Face in the Crowd.name: 芸芸众生 Face in the Crowd
Face in the Crowd.description:
你知道如何隐没于人群之中。你可以利用人群提供的掩护来进行躲藏和@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行}，当你处于至少有10个生物的人群中时，你的隐秘检定获得+2处境加值；当你处于至少有100个生物的人群中时，你的隐秘检定获得+4处境加值。处于隐藏状态的生物不算作人群成员。如果你的欺骗熟练度达到大师，你只需要5个生物就能获得这些加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IaICLG7zwOV4OKgM]{效果：人群中的面孔}

You know how to get lost in a crowd. You can use cover from crowds to Hide and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to your Stealth checks when in a crowd of at least 10 creatures and a +4 circumstance bonus to your Stealth checks when in a crowd of at least 100 creatures. Hidden creatures don't count as members of a crowd. If you're a master in Deception you only need 5 creatures to get these bonuses.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.IaICLG7zwOV4OKgM]{Effect: Face in the Crowd}

Witchwarper.name: 巫战扭曲者 Witchwarper
Witchwarper.description:
一场奇异而悖论的事件永远改变了你的存在，而如今你能够操控现实。你探索多元宇宙的无限可能，也许会将变异时间线或平行世界具象化。你创造出颠覆空间与时间的场域，使你能够施展强大的魔法。你已经学会专注于某个锚定的记忆、概念或物体，以帮助你辨识现实。

A strange paradoxical event forever altered your existence, and now you can manipulate reality. You explore the infinite possibilities of the multiverse, possibly visualizing variant timelines or parallel worlds. You create fields that subvert space and time, allowing you to cast powerful magic. You've learned to focus on an anchoring memory, concept, or object to help you identify reality.

Paradox.name: 悖论 Paradox
Paradox.description:
你的存在有悖于物质宇宙的现状，会引发量子涟漪，从而强化你的法术施放天赋，并打开通往其他世界的门户。也许你来自另一种现实或不同的时间线；也许你经历过改变自身命运的非自然现象、发现了一台时间故障的外星装置，或写过一篇关于量子魔法理论的论文。无论你的故事为何，你都已成为一个活生生的悖论。

在1级时，选择你的悖论。你所选的悖论决定了你的法术传统、额外受训的技能、你额外学会的法术，以及你的量子场的效果。你还会根据你的悖论获得专注点数和称为扭曲法术的特殊专注法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{分析师}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{异常}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{受裂隙影响}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{预知者}

Your existence is contrary to the status quo of the universe, causing quantum ripples that empower your spellcasting talent and open doorways to other worlds. Perhaps you're from an alternate reality or a different timeline, or perhaps you experienced an unnatural phenomenon that altered your path, discovered a time-glitching alien device, or wrote a treatise on quantum magical theory. Whatever your story, you've become a living paradox.

At 1st level, choose your paradox. Your chosen paradox determines the tradition of your spells, additional trained skills, additional spells you learn, and the effects of your quantum field. You also gain Focus Points and special focus spells called warp spells based on your paradox.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.42tQJXhySw9QKcn6]{Analyst}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.hFIB6wlYGK93zl4g]{Anomaly}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1E12XmyqzIK1jXrY]{Gap Influenced}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.cxBVbSITniNRwfMi]{Precog}

Quantum Field.name: 量子场 Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
你可以引动悖论性的力量来创造一个扭曲现实的量子场。它可能表现为弥漫在空气中的薄雾，显现出其他现实的闪烁残影；也可能呈现为由发光的魔法方程式构成的墙壁，或任何其他由你选择的景象。你的量子场的效果由你的悖论决定。你还可以通过选择巫战扭曲者专长以及施放扭曲法术，进一步强化并操控你的量子场。你可以通过使用扭曲现实的魔法来激活你的量子场，或延长其持续时间。

你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实} 动作，它能让你激活你的量子场。此动作会根据你所选悖论的传承获得奥术或异能特征。你还拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{量子脉冲}，它让你能够在战斗开始时迅速建立你的量子场。

You can draw on paradoxical forces to create a reality-warping quantum field. It might manifest as a haze in the air that shows shimmers of alternate realities, appear as walls of glowing magical equations, or any other display you choose. The effects of your quantum field are determined by your paradox. You can further enhance and manipulate your quantum field through your witchwarper feat selections and by casting warp spells. You can activate or extend the duration of your quantum field by using reality-warping magic.

You have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality} action, which lets you activate your quantum field. This action gains the arcane or occult trait based on the tradition of your selected paradox. You also have @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.30Nw5q4vWKCQIBIZ]{Quantum Pulse}, which lets you establish your quantum field quickly at the start of combat.

Anchor.name: 深扎 Anchor
Anchor.description:
无论是何种悖论改变了你存在的轨迹，总有某种事物帮助你锚定于现实。它可能是你随身携带的一件实体物品、关于家园的记忆，或是你所爱之人。在1级时，选择一个锚点。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{核心记忆}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{焦点}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{有形物体}

Whatever paradox altered the course of your existence, something helps keep you anchored to reality. This might be a physical object you carry, memories of your home, or loved ones. At 1st level, select an anchor.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ENxkQJEIkz35yuMT]{Core Memories}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.idjill6Zh7b3SLqE]{Focal Point}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.Z1sThY5XgXiXQBIy]{Tangible Object}

Analyst.name: 分析员 Analyst
Analyst.description:
有一套隐藏的法则为物质宇宙及其外的诸界提供动力，而通过集中你的智力，你能够接入其中并看见那些方程。

传统 奥术

悖论技能 计算机

悖论法术 戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.NkvRoN33RbDg3fl9]{Analyze Target}；1环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}；2环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tVTJS07cKDA5rNgc]{Sift the Sphere}；3环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}；4环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}；5环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CptKtBneM7od45nc]{Subjective Reality}；6环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}；7环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}；8环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}；9环：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

扭曲法术 初始：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KOkGLXwOBAIlczzk]{Warp Probability}；进阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vL7w8EtvZHlgRKlo]{Alternate Outcome}；高阶：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.v8JA4sG2tsVP2gOM]{Quantum Analysis}

量子场 当你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} 时，你可以将结果应用于你量子场内两个相关的生物、危害、无人持用的物体和效果。每当你维持你的量子场时，你都可以对你量子场内的一个目标进行 Seek 或 Recall Knowledge，作为一个自由动作。

There's a hidden code that powers the Universe and realms beyond, and by focusing your intellect, you can tap into it and see the equations.

Tradition arcane

Paradox Skill Computers

Paradox Spells cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.NkvRoN33RbDg3fl9]{Analyze Target}; 1st: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Gb7SeieEvd0pL2Eh]{Sure Strike}; 2nd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.tVTJS07cKDA5rNgc]{Sift the Sphere}; 3rd: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZYoC630tNGutgbE0]{Hypercognition}; 4th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VlNcjmYyu95vOUe8]{Translocate}; 5th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.CptKtBneM7od45nc]{Subjective Reality}; 6th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.uqlxMQQeSGWEVjki]{Truesight}; 7th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.rsZ5c0AUyywe5yoK]{Retrocognition}; 8th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wfleiawxsfhpRRwf]{Disappearance}; 9th: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.qsNeG9KZpODSACMq]{Foresight}

Warp Spells initial: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.KOkGLXwOBAIlczzk]{Warp Probability}; advanced: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.vL7w8EtvZHlgRKlo]{Alternate Outcome}; greater: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.v8JA4sG2tsVP2gOM]{Quantum Analysis}

Quantum Field When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge}, you can apply the result against two related creatures, hazards, unattended objects, and effects in your quantum field. Whenever you Sustain your quantum field, you can Seek or Recall Knowledge against a target in your quantum field as a free action.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
需求 你的量子场未处于激活状态。

你的量子场被激活，并会持续存在，直到你维持它（最长10分钟）或直到你的下个回合结束。你的量子场是一个以你在100英尺内所选一点为中心的 @Template[type:burst|distance:20]。当你的量子场处于激活状态时，你可以使用具有锚定特征的动作。你的量子场的其他具体效果由你的悖论决定。当你扭曲现实、每次你维持它时，以及当一个生物进入你的量子场时，选择区域内任意给定生物是否受到你的量子场影响。每当你用维持动作来维持一个量子场时（而非用锚定动作），你都可以将其移动到100英尺内的一个新位置。

如果你陷入失能状态、如果你将其解除，或如果你移动到离它超过100英尺远的位置，你的量子场会自动解除激活。

Requirements Your quantum field isn't active.

Your quantum field activates and lasts as long as you Sustain it (up to 10 minutes) or until the end of your next turn. Your quantum field is a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] centered on a point you choose within 100 feet. While your quantum field is active, you can use actions that have the anchoring trait. Your quantum field's other specific effects are determined by your paradox. Choose whether any given creature in the area is affected by your quantum field when you Warp Reality, each time you Sustain it, and when a creature enters your quantum field. Each time you Sustain a quantum field with the Sustain action (instead of an anchoring action), you can move it to a new position within 100 feet.

Your quantum field automatically deactivates if you're knocked out, if you Dismiss it, or if you move more than 100 feet away from it.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发条件 你掷先攻时。

你总是准备好释放自己悖论般的能力，而在身陷险境时，你会本能地释放出一股量子能量脉冲。当战斗开始时，你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{扭曲现实}。

Trigger You roll initiative.

You're always ready to let loose with your paradoxical abilities, and when imperiled, you instinctively release a pulse of quantum energy. As combat begins, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ZoMpqQgDdlT13Jp0]{Warp Reality}.

Tangible Object.name: 有形物体 Tangible Object
Tangible Object.description:
一个小物件，通常是你佩戴在身上或能用一只附肢拿住的东西，会给你带来安慰。它可能是一件有纪念意义的小饰品或衣物、一件供你摆弄的小装置，或者只是有着你觉得令人愉悦的质感。

锚定增益 你所选物件的存在或重量能帮助你在这个现实中稳住心神。你对抗幻觉和全息影像时进行的察觉检定与意志豁免都获得 +1 处境加值。

锚定效果 你的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} 状况值减少 1。若你并未陷入恐慌，则你改为在对抗恐惧效果的意志豁免上获得 +1 处境加值，且在抵抗他人对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} 的尝试时，你的意志 DC 获得 +2 处境加值，持续至你的下个回合开始。你每轮只能从此能力中受益一次。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{效果：有形物件（锚定效果）}

A small object, usually something you wear or can hold with one appendage, gives you comfort. It might be a trinket or article of clothing with sentimental value, a gadget to fidget with, or perhaps it just has a texture you find pleasing.

Anchor Benefit The presence or weight of your chosen object helps ground you in this reality. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks and Will saves against illusions and holograms.

Anchoring Effect Reduce your @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened} condition by 1. If you aren't frightened, you instead gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Will saves against fear effects and a +2 circumstance bonus to your Will DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} you until the start of your next turn. You can only benefit from this once per round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.nvB1852vEPVqjxhR]{Effect: Tangible Object (Anchoring Effect)}

Spell Repertoire.name: 法术库 Spell Repertoire
Spell Repertoire.description:
秘学者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还从你所选的连接获得一个额外法术和一个戏法。你从与你所选连接对应传统的普通法术中选择这些法术，或者从该传统中你能够获得的其他法术中选择。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放法术库中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术库中添加一个相同环阶的法术。当你获得新的法术环阶时，你获得的第一个新法术始终是由你所选连接授予的法术，但其他法术可以由你选择。在2级时，你再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从所选连接获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你可以选择一个你已知法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能够施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你以相同的速度获得它们，但你的法术位和法术库中的法术彼此独立。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换顿悟法术或连接法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

巫战扭曲者 你能够施放的法术集合称为你的法术库。在1级时，你学习两个自选的1环法术和四个自选的戏法，此外还从你的悖论获得一个额外法术和一个戏法。你从与你的悖论对应传统的普通法术中选择这些法术。你可以通过消耗一个适当法术环阶的法术位来施放法术库中的任何法术。

随着等级提升，你会向这个法术库中添加法术。每当你获得一个法术位时，你就向法术库中添加一个相同环阶的法术。在2级时，再选择一个1环法术；在3级时，你从悖论获得一个新法术和另外两个2环法术，依此类推。当你添加法术时，你可以添加一个你已拥有法术的更高环阶版本，这样你就能够施放该法术的升阶版本。

虽然你以相同的速度获得它们，但你的法术位和法术库中的法术彼此独立。如果某个专长或其他能力将一个法术加入你的法术库，它不会给予你额外的法术位，反之亦然。

替换法术库中的法术

当你在法术库中获得新法术时，你可能想替换掉一些先前学会的法术。每当你提升一级并学会新法术时，你都可以将一个旧法术替换为另一个相同环阶的不同法术。这个法术可以是戏法，但你不能替换从你的悖论获得的法术。你也可以在停工期中通过再训练来替换法术。

Mystic The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your chosen connection. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your chosen connection or from other spells from that tradition to which you have access. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell of the same rank to your spell repertoire. When you gain access to a new rank of spells, your first new spell is always the spell granted by your chosen connection, but you can choose the other spells. At 2nd level, you select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your chosen connection and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might select a higher-rank version of a spell you already know so that you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your spell repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out epiphany spells or connection spells. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper The collection of spells you can cast is called your spell repertoire. At 1st level, you learn two 1st-rank spells of your choice and four cantrips of your choice as well as an additional spell and cantrip from your paradox. You choose these from the common spells from the tradition corresponding to your paradox. You can cast any spell in your spell repertoire by using a spell slot of an appropriate spell rank.

You add to this spell repertoire as you increase in level. Each time you get a spell slot, you add a spell to your spell repertoire of the same rank. At 2nd level, select another 1st-rank spell; at 3rd level, you gain a new spell from your paradox and two other 2nd-rank spells, and so on. When you add spells, you might add a higher-rank version of a spell you already have, so you can cast a heightened version of that spell.

Though you gain them at the same rate, your spell slots and the spells in your spell repertoire are separate. If a feat or other ability adds a spell to your spell repertoire, it wouldn't give you another spell slot, and vice versa.

Swapping Spells in Your Repertoire

As you gain new spells in your repertoire, you might want to replace some of the spells you previously learned. Each time you gain a level and learn new spells, you can swap out one of your old spells for a different spell of the same rank. This spell can be a cantrip, but you can't swap out spells gained from your paradox. You can also swap out spells by retraining during downtime.

Witchwarper Spellcasting.name: 巫战扭曲者法术施放 Witchwarper Spellcasting
Witchwarper Spellcasting.description:
你的悖论赋予你魔法力量。你可以使用“施放法术”活动来施放法术。作为巫战扭曲者，当你施放法术时，你可能会大声描述自己对其他现实的启示，并配以优雅的手势，同时奥术方程或神秘符号在你周围炽然闪耀。

每天，你至多可以施放三个1环法术。你必须先知晓法术才能施放它们，而你通过法术库这一职业特性来习得它们。你每天能够施放的法术数量称为你的法术位。

随着你作为巫战扭曲者等级的提升，你每天可施放的法术数量会增加，你能够施放的最高法术环阶也会提升。

你的某些法术需要你进行一次法术攻击，以判断其效果如何；或者要求你的敌人针对你的法术DC进行掷骰（通常是进行一次豁免检定）。你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC使用你的魅力或智力调整值，取决于你为关键属性选择了哪一项。

法术高阶施放

当你获得2环及以上的法术位时，你可以用这些法术位来准备低环法术的更强版本。这会提高该法术的环阶，使其提升至与所用法术位相同的环阶。你必须在你的法术库中拥有该法术对应你想施放环阶的版本，才能将其高阶施放至该环阶。许多法术在被高阶施放至特定环阶时会获得特定的强化效果。

戏法

你的部分法术是戏法。戏法是一种特殊类型的法术，不消耗法术位。你可以随意施放戏法，每天施放任意次数。戏法总会自动高阶施放至你等级的一半（向上取整）——这通常等于你所拥有的最高巫战扭曲者法术位环阶。比如，作为1级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法是1环法术；而作为5级巫战扭曲者，你的戏法则是3环法术。

扭曲法术

你可以创造被称为扭曲法术的强大魔法现象。扭曲法术是一种专注法术。施放一个扭曲法术需要花费1点专注点，而你初始拥有一个包含1点专注点的专注池。你会在每日准备期间补满你的专注池，并且你可以通过花费10分钟使用“重新专注”活动，沉思无限世界或进行量子魔法研究，来恢复1点专注点。

专注法术会像戏法一样，自动高阶施放至你等级的一半（向上取整）。专注法术不需要法术位，而且你不能使用法术位来施放它们。选择专长可以让你获得更多专注法术，并增加你的专注池容量，不过你的专注池永远不能容纳超过3点专注点。

扭曲法术与其他专注法术不同，具有锚定特征。该特征意味着你只能在你的量子场处于激活状态时使用扭曲法术，并且当你施放扭曲法术时，会自动维持你的量子场。

你根据自己的悖论习得扭曲法术。

Your paradox grants you magical power. You can cast spells using the Cast a Spell activity. As a witchwarper, when you cast spells, you might describe your revelations about other realities aloud, accompanied by elegant gestures while arcane equations or occult symbols blaze around you.

Each day, you can cast up to three 1st-rank spells. You must know spells to cast them, and you learn them via the spell repertoire class feature. The number of spells you can cast each day is called your spell slots.

As you increase in level as a witchwarper, your number of spells per day increases, as does the highest rank of spells you can cast.

Some of your spells require you to attempt a spell attack to see how effective they are or have your enemies roll against your spell DC (typically by attempting a saving throw). Your spell attack modifiers and spell DCs use your Charisma or Intelligence modifier, depending on which you chose for your key attribute.

Heightening Spells

When you get spell slots of 2nd rank and higher, you can fill those slots with stronger versions of lower-rank spells. This increases the spell's rank, heightening it to match the spell slot. You must have a spell in your spell repertoire at the rank you want to cast in order to heighten it to that rank. Many spells have specific improvements when they're heightened to certain ranks.

Cantrips

Some of your spells are cantrips. A cantrip is a special type of spell that doesn't use spell slots. You can cast a cantrip at will, any number of times per day. A cantrip is always automatically heightened to half your level rounded up—this is usually equal to the highest rank of witchwarper spell slot you have. For example, as a 1st-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 1st-rank spells, and as a 5th-level witchwarper, your cantrips are 3rd-rank spells.

Warp Spells

You can create powerful magical phenomena known as warp spells. Warp spells are a type of focus spell. It costs 1 Focus Point to cast a warp spell, and you start with a focus pool of 1 Focus Point. You refill your focus pool during your daily preparations, and you can regain 1 Focus Point by spending 10 minutes using the Refocus activity to contemplate infinite worlds or conduct quantum magical research.

Focus spells are automatically heightened to half your level rounded up, much like cantrips. Focus spells don't require spell slots, and you can't cast them using spell slots. Taking feats can give you more focus spells and increase the size of your focus pool, though your focus pool can never hold more than 3 Focus Points.

Warp spells have the anchoring trait, unlike other focus spells. This trait means you can only use warp spells while your quantum field is active, and you automatically Sustain your quantum field when you cast warp spells.

You learn warp spells based on your paradox.

Tinkering Fingers.name: 修补匠之手 Tinkering Fingers
Tinkering Fingers.description:
你从小就学会了摆弄装置、修理物体，以及把东西拆开。你获得制作技能的受训等级。若你已因其他来源（例如你的背景或职业）而在制作技能上受训，则你改为在自选的一项技能上获得受训等级。你可以在不使用修理工具包的情况下 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{修理} 一件物品，且不会承受 –2 处境减值，你会就地取材临时凑出工具。若你拥有修理工具包，则你进行修理物品的制作检定时获得 +1 处境加值。

You grew up learning to tinker with devices, repair objects, and take things apart. You're trained in Crafting. If you're trained in Crafting from another source (from your background or class, for example), you instead become trained in a skill of your choice. You can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.bT3skovyLUtP22ME]{Repair} an item without using a repair toolkit without taking the –2 circumstance penalty, improvising tools from whatever you have at hand. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Crafting checks to Repair an item when you have a repair toolkit.

Electromag Grenade (Commercial).name: 电磁手雷（商业级） Electromag Grenade (Commercial)
Electromag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域开火

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放一片震击力场，在 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，则科技生物和无人看管的科技物品在对电磁手雷进行豁免检定时若严重失败，便会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 1d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商用） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒药的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Microcord Armor.name: 微索护甲 Microcord Armor
Microcord Armor.description:
升级： 1

这件轻甲由超轻纤维编织而成，能够随穿戴者的动作灵活弯曲，但在受到冲击时会变得像钢铁一样坚硬。

Upgrades: 1

This light armor is woven from ultralight fibers that flex with a wearer's movements but turn hard as steel on impact.

Knife.name: 刀 Knife
Knife.description:
升级： 1

刀具既可作为武器，也可作为工具，价值非凡，其形状、样式和材质多种多样，从星铁到陶瓷不一而足。

Upgrades: 1

Invaluable as both a weapon and a tool, knives come in a variety of shapes, styles, and materials ranging from starmetals to ceramics.

Zero Knife.name: 零刀 Zero Knife
Zero Knife.description:
升级： 1

如同一把弹簧刀般展开，这把武器内部的超冷腔室会瞬间形成一片冰刃。

Upgrades: 1

Unfolding like a switchblade, a supercooled chamber within this weapon instantly forms a blade of ice.

Laser Rifle.name: 激光步枪 Laser Rifle
Laser Rifle.description:
升级： 1

这些可靠、量产的步枪从方形枪管中射出集中的能量光束。协约世界通用标准型号具有很高的可改装性，设计上可搭配各种配件和升级使用，使用者会根据自己的偏好调整这把激光步枪，甚至将其拼改成几乎无法辨认的武器。

Upgrades: 1

These dependable, mass-produced rifles shoot concentrated beams of energy out of square-shaped barrels. The universal standard Pact Worlds model is highly modifiable and designed to function with a variety of accessories and upgrades, with wielders adapting the laser rifle to their preferences and even kit-bashing it into a nearly unrecognizable weapon.

Credstick.name: 信用棒 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际开拓者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是一种便于携带和花费金钱的工具。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成接收或支付资金这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要输入精神密码或念诵特定法术，才能存取其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，而更大数额的信用点通常会安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的方式。无论是冒险者还是普通市民，往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们身上通常也只会保留刚好够用的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的人们通常都会携带信用棒，而那些与协约世界有往来的其他文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换为信用点，因此同样会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途；或者，如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把整根信用棒交出去作为交易。如果一个人携带的信用棒数量多到显得累赘，那么也很容易把资金在各根信用棒之间转移，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Kasatha.name: 卡萨萨尼斯人 Kasatha
Kasatha.description:
卡萨斯人深受其遥远母星古老传统的熏陶；那颗母星环绕着一颗濒死恒星运行。作为四臂类人生物，他们乘坐一艘名为伊达里号的巨型世界飞船来到协约世界。卡萨斯人在万事万物中都追求太空平衡，并以用祖先的智慧来调和自身技术进步而自豪。

Steeped in the ancient traditions of a distant home world orbiting a dying star, kasathas are four-armed humanoids who arrived in the Pact Worlds aboard a massive worldship named Idari. Striving for cosmic balance in all things, kasathas take pride in tempering their technological advances with the wisdom of their ancestors.

Four-Armed.name: 四臂 Four-Armed
Four-Armed.description:
你有四只手臂，这使你能够持用和持握最多相当于四只手容量的武器和装备。在任何时候，其中一对手被指定为你的活动手。你可以通过执行 Switch Hands 动作，将这一指定从一对手改为另一对手；这是一个单动作。你只能用你的活动手持用物品。

You have four arms, which allows you to wield and hold up to four hands' worth of weapons and equipment. At any time, one pair of hands is designated as your active hands. You can change this designation from one pair of hands to another by taking the Switch Hands action, which is a single action. You can wield items only with your active hands.

Shipborn Kasatha.name: 飞船生克萨塔尼斯人 Shipborn Kasatha
Shipborn Kasatha.description:
你是出生并成长于伊达里号世界飞船上的卡萨斯人之一，如今它正环绕着协约世界的恒星运行。你的家人一边忍受漫长太空旅行的艰辛，一边维系着希望与传统。对你而言，伊达里号是你唯一所知的家园。当你对抗情绪效果进行豁免检定获得成功时，改为获得暴击成功。

You were one of the kasathas born and raised on the Idari worldship that now orbits the Pact Worlds' sun. Your family kept hope and tradition alive while enduring the hardships of lengthy space travel. For you, the Idari is the only home you've ever known. When you roll a success on a saving throw against an emotion effect, you get a critical success instead.

Spacefarer.name: 太空旅行者 Spacefarer
Spacefarer.description:
有些人可能会说你在漂流域里待得太久了，但事实是，一旦离开你在星舰甲板上的岗位，你就觉得不自在。你可能在长途货船、军用炮艇或观光穿梭机上担任船员。说真的，只要能让你离开星球，你大概什么工作都会报名。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在敏捷或体质上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在驾驶技能和漂流域知识技能上受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.X5jW9JALKAKV18xj]{极速驾驶员}技能专长。

Some people might say you've been out in the Drift too long, but the truth is, you don't feel at home away from your post on a starship deck. You might crew a long-haul freighter, military gunship, or tourist shuttle. Truth is, you'd probably sign up for any job that took you off-world.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Dexterity or Constitution, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Piloting skill and the Drift Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.X5jW9JALKAKV18xj]{Express Driver} skill feat.

Express Driver.name: 特快机师 Express Driver
Express Driver.description:
你知道如何快速到达那里。在驾驶载具进行当日旅行速度计算时，你可以尝试进行一次驾驶检定，以提高你的载具在长期陆路或空中旅行中的旅行速度。DC由GM决定，但通常基于载具的驾驶DC或基于环境的难度，以较高者为准。成功时，你的载具当日的旅行速度加倍。这对你的载具在遭遇中的移动，或对通过漂流域旅行的星舰，都没有效果。

You know how to get there fast. When calculating your travel Speed for the day while piloting a vehicle, you can attempt a Piloting check to increase your vehicle's travel Speed for long-term overland or aerial travel. The DC is determined by the GM but is typically based on the vehicle's piloting DC or a difficulty based on the environment, whichever is harder. On a success, double your vehicle's travel Speed for the day. This has no effect on your vehicle's movement in encounters or on starships traveling through the Drift.

Operative.name: 特工 Operative
Operative.description:
你是一名专注、机敏的专业人士，能在高风险的战斗中如鱼得水。你致命的瞄准与战术训练让你比竞争对手更具优势——对你而言，即使是最强大的敌人，也不过是另一个要干掉的目标。你在自己所选择的专精领域中展现出令人印象深刻的造诣。

You're a focused, quick-witted professional who thrives in high-stakes combat. Your deadly aim and tactical training give you an edge over the competition—for you, even the most powerful enemy is just another mark to take out. You have impressive prowess in your chosen field of specialization.

Sharpshooter.name: 神射手 Sharpshooter
Sharpshooter.description:
你能够看出目标的弱点，使你用大多数类型的远程武器造成额外的精准伤害。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{瞄准} 动作。

You can spot a target's weak points, letting you deal additional precision damage with most types of ranged weapons. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.sLikawnrJJzHMYeC]{Aim} action.

Operative's Specialization.name: 特工的专精 Operative's Specialization
Operative's Specialization.description:
作为一名特工，你会根据自己的战术风格掌握一套特定的技能。这些不同的专精有助于定义你的角色，以及你在大多数情况下所采取的应对方式。选择一个特工专精。该专精会使你在一项技能上获得受训，获得该技能的一项技能专长，以及一个漏洞利用。到9级时，你获得你的专精所赋予的强化漏洞利用。本书中介绍的专精如下。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{幽灵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{渗透者}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{散兵}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{狙击手}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{突击者}

As an operative, you have a particular set of skills based on your tactical style. These different specializations help define your character and the approach you take to most situations. Choose an operative's specialization. This specialization grants you training in one skill, a skill feat for that skill, and an exploit. At 9th level, you gain the enhanced exploit granted by your specialization. The specializations presented in this book are as follows.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.1bgDbGzALewzo7cy]{Ghost}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.u4hB3FGFJwGtjrZB]{Infiltrator}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.HSKJ1VkPdlMkcqzc]{Skirmisher}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.OCWsQQ95P7ecp7Rn]{Sniper}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.EpxKCi6G0KnWQhHP]{Striker}

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
需求 你正持用一把不具有区域（特征）的远程武器。

你仔细瞄准一个你已察觉到的单个生物，将其指定为你的标记，直到你的下个回合开始。你使用所需远程武器对你的标记进行的远程打击会额外造成 1d4 精准伤害，并使你的标记从掩护获得的 AC 处境加值减少 1。只有当你的标记处于你武器的第一距离增量内时，这些好处才会生效。你同一时间只能拥有一个标记。

随着你的特工等级提升，你瞄准的能力也会提升。在 5 级、11 级和 17 级时，精准伤害的骰子数量各增加 1 个。到 11 级时，你使你的标记从掩护获得的 AC 处境加值减少 2，而非 1。到 17 级时，你使你的标记从掩护获得的 AC 处境加值减少 4，而非 2。

Requirements You're wielding a ranged weapon that doesn't have the area trait.

You take careful aim at a single creature that you're aware of, designating it as your mark until your next turn. Your ranged Strikes against your mark using the required ranged weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 1. These benefits only apply if your mark is within your weapon's first range increment. You can only have one mark at a time.

As your operative level increases, so does your ability to Aim. Increase the number of dice for the precision damage by one at 5th, 11th, and 17th levels. At 11th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 2 rather than 1. At 17th level, you reduce the circumstance bonus to AC your mark gains from cover by 4 rather than 2.

Infiltrator.name: 渗透者 Infiltrator
Infiltrator.description:
你专精于绕过安保系统、危害、陷阱及其他防御措施。从入侵计算机系统或切断建筑物电力，到绕过生物识别锁并破解安全保险库，你擅长在不惊动安保或触发防护措施的情况下进入各类地点。你受训于计算机。你获得一个用于计算机的技能专长。

漏洞利用：你的摆弄会导致科技物品和生物出现故障与失灵。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qbyer2woEdGXZzoR]{破坏}动作。

强化漏洞利用：每当你以近战或远程攻击重击一个科技生物时，你都可以以自由动作进行破坏，目标为触发该效果的生物。每当一个科技生物，或一个正在使用科技武器的生物，对你进行近战攻击检定并大失败时，你都可以以反应进行破坏，目标为触发该效果的生物或武器。

You specialize in bypassing security systems, hazards, traps, and other defenses. From hacking a computer system or cutting power to a building, to bypassing a biometric lock and cracking a secure vault, you're skilled at accessing locations without alerting security or tripping safeguards. You're trained in Computers. You gain a skill feat for Computers.

Exploit: Your tinkering causes technological items and creatures to experience glitches and malfunctions. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.qbyer2woEdGXZzoR]{Sabotage} action.

Enhanced Exploit: You can Sabotage as a free action whenever you critically hit a tech creature with a melee or ranged attack, targeting the triggering creature. You can Sabotage as a reaction whenever a tech creature or a creature using a tech weapon critically fails a melee attack roll against you, targeting the triggering creature or weapon.

Sabotage.name: 蓄意破坏 Sabotage
Sabotage.description:
你扰乱敌方科技来掩盖你的行踪或获得战术优势。选择一个你能察觉到、位于15英尺内的单个科技生物或科技物品。若你的目标是科技生物，则对该生物的强韧DC进行一次 @Check[computers|against:fortitude] 检定。若你的目标是科技物品，则对该物品的DC进行一次计算机检定；如果该物品正被携带、持握或穿戴，则改为对持有该物品的生物的 @Check[computers|against:reflex]{反射DC} 进行一次计算机检定。

如果你在计算机上达到专家，你可以对30英尺内的科技生物或科技物品进行破坏。若你达到大师，此距离增加至45英尺。若你达到传奇，此距离增加至60英尺。

大成功 目标陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，持续1分钟。

成功 目标陷入故障 1，持续2轮。

失败 你的尝试失败，并且需要更持续的分析。目标对你的破坏免疫，直到你下个回合结束。

大失败 你的尝试反噬了你。目标对你的破坏免疫10分钟。

You disrupt enemy tech to cover your tracks or gain a tactical advantage. Select a single tech creature or tech item within 15 feet that you can detect. If your target is a tech creature, attempt a @Check[computers|against:fortitude] check against the creature's Fortitude DC. If your target is a tech item, attempt a Computers check against the item's DC or the @Check[computers|against:reflex]{Reflex DC} of the creature possessing the item if the item is being carried, held, or worn.

If you're an expert in Computers, you can Sabotage a tech creature or tech item within 30 feet. If you're a master, this range increases to 45 feet. If you're legendary, this range increases to 60 feet.

Critical Success The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} for 1 minute.

Success The target becomes glitching 1 for 2 rounds.

Failure Your attempt fails and requires more persistent analysis. The target is immune to your Sabotage until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure Your attempt backfires. The target is immune to your Sabotage for 10 minutes.

Natural Grace.name: 天生优雅 Natural Grace
Natural Grace.description:
频率 每天一次

触发 你在一次特技技能检定或反射豁免检定中失败。

你对自己动作的控制近乎超自然，这有时能在危险处境中救你一命。你可以重掷触发此次能力的技能检定或豁免检定，即使第二次结果更差也必须采用。

Frequency once per day

Trigger You fail an Acrobatics check or Reflex saving throw.

You have an almost supernatural control of your movements, which can sometimes save you in dangerous situations. You can reroll the triggering skill check or saving throw, using the second result even if it's worse.

Weakening Shot.name: 削弱射击 Weakening Shot
Weakening Shot.description:
要求 你正持用一把枪。

你瞄准一个生物的四肢或承重附肢，以削弱它们。你先进行瞄准，然后对你的标记目标进行一次远程打击。若此次打击命中，该生物陷入你选择的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}，直到你下个回合结束（若为重击，则改为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 2} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 2}）。

Requirements You're wielding a gun.

You target a creature's limbs or load-bearing appendages to weaken them. You Aim and then make a ranged Strike against your mark. If the Strike hits, the creature becomes your choice of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of your next turn (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} on a critical hit).

Electromag Grenade (Commercial).name: 电磁手雷（商业级） Electromag Grenade (Commercial)
Electromag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放出一片电击力场，在@Template[burst|distance:5]内造成1d8点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可使用手雷的重击专精效果，则科技生物和无人持用的科技物品在对电磁手雷的豁免检定中大失败时，会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 1d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴片（商用） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Freebooter Armor.name: 掠夺者护甲 Freebooter Armor
Freebooter Armor.description:
升级： 1

掠夺者护甲以那些经常穿着这类装束的海盗和亡命之徒命名。掠夺者护甲通常由穿在夹克或飞行服内的胸甲、厚重的靴子和手套、头盔，以及用于藏匿武器的隐藏绑带和枪套组成。

Upgrades: 1

Freebooter armor is named for the pirates and outlaws who often wear these outfits. Freebooter armor typically consists of a breastplate worn under a jacket or flight suit, heavy boots and gloves, a helmet, and hidden straps and holsters for concealing weapons.

Zero Pistol.name: 零式手枪 Zero Pistol
Zero Pistol.description:
升级： 1

零度手枪使用装有超冷液体的透明罐作为弹药。

Upgrades: 1

Zero pistols use transparent canisters of supercooled liquid as ammunition.

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际探险家》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品中，这种物品被称为信用棒。此类装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来便捷携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成资金的接收或支付这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们可以要求语音或生物特征印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念出特定法术，才能访问其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通往个人全部财富的入口，数量更多的信用点通常会被安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点转移方式，不易被追踪。冒险者和平民百姓往往都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的任何购买，同时身上只保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使丢失了信用棒，也不至于破产。

协约世界中的个人常常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常会将本地资金转换为信用点，并因此携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途，或者如果他们想进行一笔预定金额的购买，也可以直接把那根棒交易出去。要是一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略不计的负载。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Vesk.name: 维斯克蜥人 Vesk
Vesk.description:
维斯克蜥人是一个好战的爬行类种族，在发展出太空航行技术后不久便征服了其恒星系中的八个世界，建立了维斯卡里姆帝国。维斯克蜥人往往崇尚冲突，并尊重力量与军事武力。

Vesk are a warmongering, reptilian people who conquered the eight worlds in their solar system shortly after they developed spaceflight, forming the Veskarium empire. Vesk tend to embrace conflict and respect strength and military might.

Nightstalker Vesk.name: 夜行者维斯克蜥人 Nightstalker Vesk
Nightstalker Vesk.description:
你已经适应了在黑暗中生活，也许是因为生活在地下、昏暗的星舰走廊中、烟雾笼罩的天空下，或是在一颗远离其恒星的行星上。你获得黑暗视觉。

You've adapted to live in darkness, perhaps due to living underground, in dim starship corridors, under smoke-shrouded skies, or on a planet far from its sun. You gain darkvision.

Outlaw.name: 亡命之徒 Outlaw
Outlaw.description:
你是个职业罪犯，恶名昭彰。也许是不公的处境逼你走上了犯罪生涯，又或者你享受成功干下一票或在枪战中活下来的刺激感。无论如何，这种生活是你唯一熟悉的，而拜你头上的赏金所赐，你会一直过这种日子，直到棺材落地，或是赚到足够的信用点给自己买个新的身份。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加在力量或魅力上，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在威吓技能和黑社会知识技能上受训。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{威吓射击}技能专长。

You're a career criminal with a nasty reputation. Perhaps unfair circumstances forced you into a life of crime, or maybe you enjoy the thrill you get from pulling off a heist or living through a shoot-out. Either way, this life is the only one you know, and thanks to the bounty on your head, you're in it until the casket drops or you make enough creds to buy a new one.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Strength or Charisma, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Intimidation skill and the Underworld Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.zdycsO9Z0wHBZ17k]{Intimidating Shot} skill feat.

Intimidating Shot.name: 威吓射击 Intimidating Shot
Intimidating Shot.description:
你尝试通过朝空中开火，用你的远程武器对一名敌人进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{威吓}，消耗等同于该武器 expend 的弹药，并使用该武器的最大射程，而不是通常的 30 英尺射程。如果目标与你不共享语言，此次检定不会承受 –4 的情境减值。

You attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize} a foe with your ranged weapon by firing it into the air, using ammo equal to the weapon's expend and the weapon's maximum range rather than the usual range of 30 feet. This check doesn't take a –4 circumstance penalty if the target doesn't share a language with you.

Solarian.name: 星辉武者 Solarian
Solarian.description:
你是宇宙恒星之力的传导者——一名太阳骑士。引力与光代表了这些力量的两极，而你可以在它们之间进行调谐。作为这一循环的代理者，你能显现出一系列太阳装备，并利用你自身与恒星之力的连接来强化它们。无论你偏好恒星光谱的哪一极端，你都可以在它们之间改变自己的调谐状态，以运用通过冥想与练习获得的太阳力量。

You're a conduit for the stellar forces of the cosmos—a solar knight. The powers of gravity and light represent the extremes of these forces, and you can attune yourself between them. As an agent of this cycle, you manifest an array of solar equipment and use your own connection to stellar forces to empower them. Regardless of which extreme of the stellar spectrum you prefer, you can change your attunement between them to take advantage of solar powers earned through meditation and practice.

Solar Manifestations.name: 星辰显化 Solar Manifestations
Solar Manifestations.description:
你对物质宇宙恒星之力的深刻理解，会以多种有形方式显现出来。你可以创造并维持三种不同的显现：日焰、日冕和太阳武器。当你变为未调谐时，你的显现会暂时消失。

日焰

一小团太阳之力悬浮在你附近，或嵌附在你身体的某个部位上，例如你的手掌或脸上。这团微光可以在短距离内释放一道定向的能量爆发。你的日焰是一种属于搏斗武器组、具有调谐和恒星武士特征的军用远程武器。它不占用手，也无需持握即可挥舞。你的日焰不能成为其他生物的目标，也不能从你身上被移除，除非你变为未调谐。你的调谐状态决定了日焰的伤害类型和射程增量。你将你的力量调整值加到日焰的伤害掷骰中。你可以用恒星武士水晶提升日焰的伤害。

引力子调谐 1d8 钝击，射程增量15尺。若你严重成功，你可以尝试以一个自由动作对目标进行@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔}，无视射程和多重攻击减值，即使你没有空闲手也可以。

光子调谐 1d6 火焰，射程增量30尺。若你严重成功，目标还会额外受到1d6持续性火焰伤害。

日冕

一层恒星能量环绕着你，覆盖在你的身体或所穿护甲之上。根据你当前的调谐状态，它会表现为一层发光的光辉或凝实的黑暗。日冕的整体外观和形状由你选择，可能看起来像环绕你的能量网格，或覆盖在你现有装备之上的尖刺能量护甲。这种设计不会影响其功能，也不会提供任何额外加值。

你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{日冕激涌}反应。

太阳武器

凭借纯粹的意志，你唤出一把由群星精华锻造而成的有形武器。这把武器是你自身的延伸，而你可以通过冥想改变它的形态。当你显现这把武器时，它会出现在你所选择的一只空闲手中。若它具有不占手特征，则它可以显现在任意一只手中。你的太阳武器是一种军用近战武器。它造成1d8点你选择的钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害，并具有调谐和恒星武士特征。

在1级时，为你的武器从以下特征中至多选择两项。或者，你可以为武器选择“伸距”或“双手 1d10”特征之一，而不是从以下特征中选择两项。

  • 缴械
  • 不占手
  • 擒抱
  • 非致命
  • 招架
  • 推撞
  • 横扫
  • 绊摔
  • 多用（仅限B/P/S）
  • 伸距（计为两项特征）
  • 双手 1d10（计为两项特征）

你可以为你的武器选择以下一种武器组作为其所属武器组。

  • 斧
  • 搏斗
  • 棍棒
  • 连枷
  • 锤
  • 刀
  • 镐
  • 长柄武器
  • 矛
  • 剑

你的太阳武器会根据你当前的调谐状态获得额外好处。

引力子调谐 当你使用太阳武器成功对一个生物进行打击时，直到其下个回合结束前，该生物所在空间及所有与之相邻的方格对该生物而言都视为困难地形。

光子调谐 当你用太阳武器成功对一个生物进行打击时，你会额外造成等于你等级一半（向上取整）的火焰伤害。你的太阳武器会在5尺半径内投射明亮光照（并在之后5尺内提供微光光照）。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{重铸太阳武器}

Your deep understanding of the stellar forces of the universe manifests in a variety of tangible ways. You can create and maintain three different manifestations: a solar flare, solar nimbus, and solar weapon. Your manifestations temporarily vanish if you become unattuned.

Solar Flare

A small mote of solar power hovers nearby or appears embedded on some part of your body, such as the palm of your hand or on your face. This mote can unleash a directed blast of energy at short range. Your solar flare is a martial ranged weapon in the brawling weapon group with the attuned and solarian traits. It doesn't take up a hand and doesn't need to be held to be wielded. Your solar flare can't be targeted by other creatures or removed from your person, except for when you become unattuned. Your attunement determines the damage type and range increment of your solar flare. You add your Strength modifier to damage rolls with your solar flare. You can improve the damage of your solar flare with solarian crystals.

Graviton-Attuned 1d8 bludgeoning, range increment 15 feet. On a critical success, you can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} the target as a free action, ignoring range and multiple attack penalty, even if you don't have a free hand.

Photon-Attuned 1d6 fire, range increment 30 feet. On a critical success, the target additionally takes 1d6 persistent fire damage.

Solar Nimbus

A layer of stellar energy surrounds you, overlaying your body or worn armor. It appears as a layer of glowing light or solid darkness, depending on your current state of attunement. The general appearance and shape of the nimbus is your choice and could appear as a lattice of energy surrounding you or imposing spiked energy armor layered atop your existing equipment. This design has no impact on its function and doesn't provide any additional bonuses.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.q7UDeO9Ko1EbPRWm]{Nimbus Surge} reaction.

Solar Weapon

Through sheer will, you call forth a tangible weapon forged from the essence of stars. This weapon is an extension of yourself, and you can change its form with meditation. When manifesting your weapon, it appears in a free hand of your choice. If it has the free-hand trait, it can manifest in any hand. Your solar weapon is a martial melee weapon. It deals 1d8 of your choice of bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage with the attuned and solarian traits.

At first level, choose up to two of the following traits for your weapon. Alternatively, you can select the reach or two-hand 1d10 trait for your weapon instead of selecting two of the following traits.

  • Disarm
  • Free-Hand
  • Grapple
  • Nonlethal
  • Parry
  • Shove
  • Sweep
  • Trip
  • Versatile (B/P/S only)
  • Reach (counts as two traits)
  • Two-Hand 1d10 (counts as two traits)

You can select one of the following weapon groups for your weapon to be a part of.

  • Axe
  • Brawling
  • Club
  • Flail
  • Hammer
  • Knife
  • Pick
  • Polearm
  • Spear
  • Sword

Your solar weapon gains additional benefits based on your current attunement.

Graviton-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature using your solar weapon, that creature's space and all squares adjacent to it are difficult terrain for that creature until the end of its next turn.

Photon-Attuned When you successfully Strike a creature with your solar weapon, you deal an additional amount of fire damage equal to half your level (rounded up). Your solar weapon casts bright light in a 5-foot radius (and dim light for the next 5 feet).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.uvtdqSfKD6oXNA29]{Re-Forge Solar Weapon}

Stellar Attunement.name: 恒星调谐 Stellar Attunement
Stellar Attunement.description:
作为一名星辉武者，你的存在在恒星的诸面向之间循环。你起始拥有两个面向：光子（恒星释放热、光与等离子体的力量）和引力子（恒星通过引力吸引并禁锢物体的力量）。在任何时候，你都被视为已与引力子调谐、已与光子调谐，或未调谐。你的许多能力会根据你当前的调谐获得额外效果，而某些能力会将你当前的调谐状态切换为另一种状态。

你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{调谐} 动作。

As a solarian, your existence cycles between the aspects of stars. You begin with two aspects: photon (the power of stars to emit heat, light, and plasma) and graviton (the power of stars to attract and imprison objects through gravity). At any time, you're considered graviton-attuned, photon-attuned, or unattuned. Many of your abilities have additional effects based on your current attunement, and some abilities swap your current state of attunement to another state.

You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.3xDhpvORBmK6AtcI]{Attune} action.

Nimbus Surge.name: 灵云激涌 Nimbus Surge
Nimbus Surge.description:
触发条件 你触及范围内的一个生物使用一个操纵动作或一个移动动作、进行一次远程攻击，或在其正在使用的移动动作期间离开一个方格。

你的灵光迸发出能量，迫使敌人的防御出现破绽。对触发该反应的生物进行一次近战打击。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值，且你的多重攻击减值也不适用于此次打击。

引力调谐 若此次打击为严重成功，则目标必须进行一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免；若其失败，则直到其回合结束前变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{虚弱 1}。

光子调谐 若此次打击为严重成功，则目标必须进行一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免；若其失败，则直到其回合开始前变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1}。

Trigger A creature within your reach uses a manipulate action or a move action, makes a ranged attack, or leaves a square during a move action it's using.

Your nimbus surges with energy, forcing an opening in your foe's defenses. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty, and your multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Graviton-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} until the end of its turn.

Photon-Attuned If the Strike is a critical success, the target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its turn.

Re-Forge Solar Weapon.name: 重铸太阳武器 Re-Forge Solar Weapon
Re-Forge Solar Weapon.description:
你花费 10 分钟专注于你太阳武器的构成。你可以改变你太阳武器的伤害类型（通常在钝击、穿刺或挥砍之间选择）、所选特性以及武器组。你的武器会保持你的选择，直到你下次重铸太阳武器为止。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

You spend 10 minutes focusing on the composition of your solar weapon. You can change your solar weapon's damage type (typically choosing between bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing), selected traits, and weapon group. Your weapon maintains your selections until the next time you Re-Forge Solar Weapon.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Attune.name: 调谐 Attune
Attune.description:
频率 每轮一次

你稳住自己的身心，并使自己调谐至你所选择的星辰面向。你变为调谐至光子或引力子。你也可以显现你的任意一个太阳显现，前提是它们当前处于休眠状态，且你有可用于使用它们的空闲手。

特殊 除了上述用法外，当你掷先攻时，你也可以以一个自由动作进行调谐。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{效果：太阳武器}

Frequency once per round

You steady your body and mind and attune yourself to the stellar aspect of your choice. You become attuned to photon or graviton. You can also manifest any of your solar manifestations if they're currently dormant and if you have the free hands to use them.

Special In addition to the above usage, you can also Attune as a free action when you roll initiative.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.UlFxEP3YrbseKA62]{Effect: Solar Weapon}

Fearless.name: 无畏 Fearless
Fearless.description:
无论是出于责任感还是出于成功的渴望，当面对可怕的敌人时，你很少会退缩。如果你在针对恐惧效果的豁免检定中获得成功，则改为获得大成功。

Whether it comes from a sense of duty or a desire to succeed, you rarely flinch when confronted by fearsome foes. If you roll a success on a saving throw against a fear effect, you get a critical success instead.

Solar Shield.name: 日炎护盾 Solar Shield
Solar Shield.description:
你已开发出一种新的太阳显化——一面环绕你运转的微型恒星能量护盾。这个能量护盾具有调谐和恒星武士（特征）特征，且使用时不需要占用手。你可以执行“举盾”，使你获得 AC +1 处境加值，直到你的下一回合开始。你获得“盾牌格挡”泛用专长。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.q5W7fV1wXvqBFxt8]{效果：太阳护盾}

当护盾举起时，你可以用你的护盾使用“盾牌格挡”反应。该护盾的生命值等于 5 + 你等级的两倍，坚固值等于你等级的一半，向上取整。你的护盾不会破损，但如果它被摧毁，你在 10 分钟内无法显化新的护盾。如果你的护盾因你失去调谐而消失，那么当你调谐以重塑它时，护盾会带着先前所拥有的生命值返回。该护盾会在你每日准备期间，以及每当你休息至少 10 分钟时，恢复所有失去的生命值，即使它已经被摧毁也是如此。

引力子调谐 如果你的护盾被摧毁，它会释放出一道冲击波。相邻的敌人必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免，否则将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 1 轮（若重度失败则为 2 轮）。

光子调谐 如果你的护盾被摧毁，它会释放出一道闪光。相邻的敌人必须成功通过一次对抗你职业 DC 的 @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] 豁免，否则将 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{目眩} 1 轮（若重度失败则 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{失明} 1 轮）。

You've developed a new solar manifestation—a small shield of stellar energy that orbits you. This energy shield has the attuned and solarian traits and doesn't require a hand to use. You can Raise a Shield, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn. You gain the Shield Block general feat.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.q5W7fV1wXvqBFxt8]{Effect: Solar Shield}

While the shield is raised, you can use the Shield Block reaction with your shield. The shield has Hit Points equal to 5 plus twice your level and Hardness equal to half your level, rounded up. Your shield can't be broken, but if it's destroyed, you can't manifest a new shield for 10 minutes. If your shield vanishes due to you losing attunement, when you Attune to reform it, the shield returns with however many Hit Points it previously had. The shield regains all its lost Hit Points during your daily preparations and whenever you rest for at least 10 minutes, even if it's been destroyed.

Graviton-Attuned If your shield is destroyed, it releases a shock wave. Adjacent enemies must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} for 1 round (2 rounds on a critical failure).

Photon-Attuned If your shield is destroyed, it releases a flash of light. Adjacent enemies must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|against:solarian] save against your class DC or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round on a critical failure).

Shield Block.name: 护盾格挡 Shield Block
Shield Block.description:
触发 你已举起盾牌，并将要受到攻击造成的物理伤害（钝击、穿刺或挥砍）。

你眼疾手快地调整盾牌位置，接下一次猛击。你的盾牌为你减免等于盾牌硬度的伤害值。你和盾牌均会受到其余的伤害，这可能导致盾牌破损或被摧毁。

Electromag Grenade (Commercial).name: 电磁手雷（商业级） Electromag Grenade (Commercial)
Electromag Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域射击

重击 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}

这些手雷会释放一片电击力场，在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内造成 1d8 点电击伤害，并允许进行一次 @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] 豁免检定。若你可以使用手雷的重击专精效果，则科技生物和无人持有的科技物品在对电磁手雷进行豁免检定时重度失败，会陷入故障状态。

Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 1d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Defrex Hide.name: 德弗雷克斯兽皮 Defrex Hide
Defrex Hide.description:
升级： 1

这种中型护甲由维斯克二号原生的一种凶猛哺乳动物的兽皮制成，尤其受到维斯克蜥人的欢迎。将这种生物厚实兽皮鞣制后的大片皮革用金属丝缝合在一起，关节处再用金属钉或金属鳞片加固。

Upgrades: 1

Made from the hide of a ferocious mammal native to Vesk-2, this medium armor is especially popular among vesk. Tanned slabs of the creature's thick hide are stitched together with metal wires, and the joints are reinforced with metal studs or scales.

Machine Gun.name: 机枪 Machine Gun
Machine Gun.description:
升级： 1

这些久经考验且可靠的自动武器能够进行短点射，或将弹匣彻底打空，以扫清战场。

Upgrades: 1

These proven and reliable automatic weapons are capable of firing in short bursts or completely emptying their magazines to clear a battlefield.

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
在《星际探险家》中，大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种称为信用棒的受保护物品上。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但归根结底，它们只是用来便捷携带和花费金钱的一种手段。这些装置的使用方式由所有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻触一下，就能完成接收或支付资金这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们也可以要求语音或生物识别印记才能激活。一些先进信用棒甚至带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或吟诵特定法术，才能提取其中储存的资金。

信用棒并不是通往一个人全部财富的入口，而数额更大的信用点储备通常会安全地保存在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种安全且匿名的信用点流通方式，不易被追踪。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以处理自己可能需要进行的各种购买；同时，他们也只会在身上保留刚好足够的信用点，这样即使遗失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常会将本地资金转换为信用点，因此同样会携带信用棒来花费这些兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，分别用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预先确定金额的购买，也可能会直接把整根棒转交出去。要是一个人身上的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，也很容易在各根信用棒之间转移资金，并丢弃已经清空的信用棒以节省空间，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略的负重。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they're just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren't gateways to the entirety of one's wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn't result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it's easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Khizar.name: 希扎尔 Khizar
Khizar.description:
基扎尔是有智慧的植物，与自然和谐共生，并已学会通过心灵感应与其他生物交流。

Khizars are intelligent plants who live in harmony with nature and have learned to communicate telepathically with other creatures.

Limited Telepathy.name: 有限心灵感应 Limited Telepathy
Limited Telepathy.description:
你可以与30英尺内的生物进行心灵交流。你只能与和你共享语言的生物交流。这不会让你接触到它们的思想，而且其传达的信息不会比正常言语更多。

You can communicate mentally with creatures within 30 feet. You can communicate only with creatures that share a language with you. This doesn't give you any access to their thoughts, and it communicates no more information than normal speech would.

Verdant.name: 翠绿 Verdant
Verdant.description:
你在对抗精神效果、麻痹、毒素或睡眠时的豁免检定获得+1处境加值。如果你每天至少暴露在自然阳光下4小时，就不需要进食、饮水或睡眠。

You receive a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against mental effects, paralysis, poison, or sleep. You don't need to eat, drink, or sleep if you're exposed to natural sunlight for at least 4 hours per day.

Recluse.name: 隐士 Recluse
Recluse.description:
你曾经也是个有身份的人，但那已经是上一段人生的事了。如今你离群索居，在荒野中勉强以隐士的身份维生，或在破败街区里做个独来独往的人。你原以为自己已经把过去抛在身后，直到一位新的弟子或一名旧日仇敌把你重新拖回了冒险生活。

选择两项属性增强。其中一项必须加给体质或感知，另一项为自由属性增强。

你在生存技能以及一项与你前半生相关的知识技能上受过训练。你获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.1Bt7uCW2WI4sM84P]{可疑知识}技能专长。

You used to be someone, but that was in another life. You keep to yourself these days, eking out an existence as a hermit in the wilderness or a loner in a rundown neighborhood. You thought you put your past behind you, until a new disciple or an old enemy dragged you back into a life of adventure.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be to Constitution or Wisdom, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Survival skill and a Lore skill related to your former life. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.1Bt7uCW2WI4sM84P]{Dubious Knowledge} skill feat.

Dubious Knowledge.name: 可疑知识 Dubious Knowledge
Dubious Knowledge.description: 你是信息的宝库，但它们的来源并非全都可靠。当你使用任何技能进行的回忆知识检定失败（但没有大失败）时，你会得到一个正确的答案和一个错误的答案，但你不会知道哪个是正确的。也可能是知道某件事情非常重要，但不知道它是好是坏。

Inflorescent.name: 花序ային Inflorescent
Inflorescent.description:
你从生命能量的源泉中汲取力量，使自己始终繁花常开。选择一个戏法：@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash}，你可以将其作为原始先天法术随意施放。此选择不能更改。戏法会被升阶至等于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。你还会获得对抗虚空效果的豁免检定+1处境加值。

You draw from a wellspring of vital energy to remain constantly in bloom. Choose one cantrip: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.SnjhtQYexDtNDdEg]{Stabilize} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.kcelf6IHl3L9VXXg]{Vitality Lash}, which you can cast as a primal innate spell at will. This choice can't be changed. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against void effects.

Soldier.name: 士兵 Soldier
Soldier.description:
你是区域武器、重甲以及承受伤害方面的大师。你在激烈的战斗中冲锋陷阵，对敌人倾泻毁灭性的齐射，同时承受回击而来的猛烈火力。通过用强力武器布下压制火力弹幕，你为盟友创造条件，使他们能够履行各自的职责，同时鼓励敌人将注意力集中在你身上。

You're a master of area weapons, heavy armor, and soaking damage. You fight in the thick of the battle and unleash devastating salvos against your foes as you take withering fire in return. By laying down a barrage of suppressing fire with powerful weapons, you set your allies up to fulfill their respective roles while encouraging enemies to focus on you.

Soldier Fighting Style.name: 士兵战斗风格 Soldier Fighting Style
Soldier Fighting Style.description:
作为一名士兵，你会接受某种特定战斗风格的训练。你的风格决定了你如何应对战斗，而且往往会改变你如何利用自己压制目标的能力。选择一种士兵战斗风格。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{动作英雄}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{装甲风暴}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{轰击}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{近距离作战}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{博学战士}

As a soldier, you train using a specific style of fighting. Your style determines how you approach combat and often changes how you take advantage of your ability to suppress targets. Choose a soldier fighting style.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.ajzZpzc8uMtgU6N8]{Action Hero}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.T78VQC8oaD1Odz1k]{Armor Storm}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.VDEYb7aAwAjBp8Av]{Bombard}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.5mOTKBsn8OsEvFaA]{Close Quarters}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.class-features.Item.FSAqTE67445EvyX8]{Erudite Warrior}

Action Hero.name: 动作英雄 Action Hero
Action Hero.description:
你相信任何问题都可以靠一路开枪解决。不知为何，尽管逻辑往往表明并非如此，你的虚张声势和夸张过头的行动却总能奏效。对你来说，没有什么问题是弹雨或激光齐射解决不了的。你已经成为使用自动武器制造毁灭的专家，无论是在前线作战、在高速载具上操作炮塔，还是在敌群中一路轰杀。

当你使用自动武器成功进行一次远程打击时，你会使目标 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{压制}，直到你下个回合开始。此外，当你 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{自动射击} 时，锥形区域的大小等于该武器的完整射程增量，而非一半。使用自动射击动作时，你可以将锥形区域中的任意一个目标指定为你的主要目标，而不必是离你最近的生物。

You believe that anything can be solved by shooting your way out. Somehow, your bravado and over-the-top actions have a way of working out for you, despite logic often suggesting otherwise. To you, there's no problem that a barrage of bullets or laser blasts can't fix. You've become a specialist at dealing out devastation with automatic weapons, whether you're fighting on the front line, operating a turret in a speeding vehicle, or blasting through a crowd of enemies.

When you successfully make a ranged Strike with an automatic weapon, you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppress} the target until the start of your next turn. In addition, when you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}, the size of the cone is equal to the weapon's full range increment, rather than half. When using the Auto-Fire action, you can designate a target anywhere in the cone to be your primary target, rather than the creature closest to you.

Walking Armory.name: 步行军械库 Walking Armory
Walking Armory.description:
你的耐力训练使你能够携带大量沉重装备。决定你在使用护甲时的力量时，你可以改为选择使用你的体质调整值。如果你已经满足所穿护甲的力量需求，则将该护甲的负重减轻 1（最低为 1）。

此外，你在变为负重前可携带的负重值提高你的体质调整值的一半（向上取整）。你的最大可携带负重值提高你的体质调整值。

Your endurance training empowers you to carry a load of heavy equipment. When determining your Strength for using armor, you can instead choose to use your Constitution modifier. If you already meet the Strength requirement for the armor you're wearing, reduce that armor's Bulk by 1 (to a minimum of 1).

In addition, increase the amount of Bulk you can carry before becoming encumbered by half your Constitution modifier rounded up. Increase your maximum carried Bulk by your Constitution modifier.

Suppressing Fire.name: 压制射击 Suppressing Fire
Suppressing Fire.description:
你擅长运用强力武器骚扰敌人并阻碍其移动，令其无法发挥巅峰状态。当你进行带有区域特征的攻击时（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} 或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}），你会以一种压制目标的方式来使用它。受影响区域内未能通过对抗你攻击之豁免的敌人会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到你下个回合开始。受压制的目标在攻击检定上承受 –1 处境减值，并且其速度承受 –10 尺状态减值。某些士兵能力与职业专长还会进一步与受压制状态互动。

You have a knack for using powerful weapons to harry your foes and hinder their movement, preventing them from operating at their peak. When you make an attack with the area trait (such as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.oc0ZKnk5zD0GXqZi]{Area Fire} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.6ctkxUnVwqooSvgg]{Auto-Fire}), you use it in a manner that suppresses your targets. Enemies in the affected area who fail their save against your attack become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the start of your next turn. A suppressed target takes a –1 circumstance penalty on attack rolls and takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds. Some soldier abilities and class feats interact further with the suppressed condition.

Primary Target.name: 主要目标 Primary Target
Primary Target.description:
当你释放强力区域武器的全部毁灭性威力时，你可以将火力集中在单一目标上。在你用武器进行一次区域攻击之前（例如通过区域射击或自动射击动作），你可以以同一把武器对区域内的单个生物进行一次远程打击，作为一个自由动作，该生物被选为你的主要目标。若你的攻击是爆发，你必须选择距离攻击中心最近的生物。若你的攻击是锥形或线形，你必须选择离你最近的生物。若两个或更多生物距离相同，你可以选择其中哪一个作为你的主要目标。若命中，若你的主要目标在对抗你的区域射击或自动射击动作时掷出了成功，则改为失败。此次打击不计入你的多重攻击减值。

You can focus fire on a single target when unleashing the full devastation of your powerful area weaponry. Before you make an area attack with a weapon (such as from the Area Fire or Auto-Fire actions), you can make a ranged Strike as a free action with the same weapon against a single creature in the area, who's selected as your primary target. If your attack is a burst, you must select the creature closest to the center of the attack. If your attack is a cone or line, you must select the creature closest to you. If two or more creatures are equidistant, you can choose which one is your primary target. On a hit, if your primary target rolls a success against your Area Fire or Auto-Fire action, they get a failure instead. This Strike doesn't count toward your multiple attack penalty.

Sturdy Vine.name: 坚韧藤蔓 Sturdy Vine
Sturdy Vine.description:
你长出了一根粗壮的藤蔓，可以用来重击敌人。你获得一种藤蔓无武装攻击，它属于搏斗武器组，造成 1d6 钝击伤害，并具有 khizar、横扫、绊摔和无武装特征。
